name: mostAsNtfFunctionSet
title: mostAsNtfFunctionSet
syntax: long mostAsNtfFunctionSet(long deviceID, long fblockID, long instID, long functionID)
description: Registers a notification client in the notification matrix. Functionality is similar to command message FBlock.Notification.Set(SetFunction, deviceID, functionID).
The notification matrix can be written with the function without sending a respective message.
The notification matrix is deleted on NetOn and if the network status changes to ConfigNotOk.
